WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.label: recharge
WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.description: The drone will seek a charger to recharge.

WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.label: shutdown
WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.description: The drone will find a safe spot to self-shutdown.

WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.label: auto fight
WulaFallenEmpire.DroneWorkModeDef.description: The drone will automatically seek and attack enemies.
